label: Create Keyframes
description: Turn a scene's linked TV shots into clean keyframe generation tasks.
checklist: Keep all frames clean with no speech bubbles
Reject readable text, logos, labels and fake subtitles
Save best candidate per shot with scene and shot id

label: Plan Motion
description: Create per-shot motion instructions from approved keyframes and tvShots animation notes.
checklist: Do not let motion change character identity
Add only subtle acting loops unless shot requires action
Match duration to TV shot timecode

label: Prepare Voice
description: Extract all voice lines for a scene and prepare timing notes for TTS or voice acting.
checklist: Kralle stays dry Kiez-boss, not cute

label: Continuity Review
description: Review a scene's generated assets against continuity, style and clean-frame rules.
checklist: Location reads as the correct set

label: Send To Assembly
description: Package approved keyframes, motion notes, voice lines and sound cues for final TV-style assembly.
checklist: All linked TV shots are approved
